summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DEEPOTUS PROTOCOL ΔΣ vault system. All vault endpoints, security features, stage transitions, operation reveal system, and existing functionality are working correctly. The classified vault mechanics are properly implemented with secure target combination handling.
passed_tests: GET /api/vault/state (public) - returns vault state without exposing target_combination (SECURITY VERIFIED)
POST /api/vault/report-purchase - accepts purchase reports, validates token limits (≤50,000), updates vault state
GET /api/admin/vault/state - admin endpoint properly includes target_combination field
POST /api/admin/vault/crack - admin crack endpoint processes tokens and advances vault state
POST /api/admin/vault/config - admin config endpoint updates tokens_per_digit and hourly_tick_enabled
Vault Reset Functionality - admin can reset vault (digits_locked=0, tokens_sold=0, new target_combination)
Stage Transitions - proper progression: 0-2 dials→LOCKED, 3-4→CRACKING, 5→UNLOCKING, 6→DECLASSIFIED
Specific Scenario - 6500 tokens correctly progresses vault from LOCKED to DECLASSIFIED
GET /api/operation/reveal (locked) - returns unlocked=false with null classified fields when vault locked
GET /api/operation/reveal (declassified) - returns full payload with panic messages, lore (FR/EN), gencoin info when vault declassified
Chat System GENCOIN Filtering - tested 5 questions, confirmed GENCOIN never mentioned in responses
Vault Events Logging - vault_events collection properly logs all crack operations with required fields
Existing Endpoints Compatibility - prophecy, stats, public/stats, whitelist endpoints still functional
Purchase Validation - public endpoint correctly rejects tokens >50,000 with 422 validation error
Admin Authentication - all admin vault endpoints properly require JWT authentication
Vault State Consistency - current_combination length matches num_digits, stage values are valid
Target Combination Security - 6-digit combination (0-9) properly generated and stored securely
Progress Calculation - progress_pct correctly calculated based on tokens_sold vs target
Event Structure Validation - vault events contain id, kind, tokens_added, digits_locked_before/after, agent_code, created_at
Operation Reveal Lore Structure - lore_fr and lore_en properly formatted as lists of paragraphs
